subject: docs(cleanup): delete superseded plans and migration doc; refresh session notes
body:
Three docs were describing work that has since shipped:
- docs/PLAN_api_migration.md — src/api/ exists, zero supabase.from/rpc
  remain, migration is done.
- docs/PLAN_intent_labels_and_summaries.md — 8 intents + 60-char tones
  + multi-word normalization + summary_does/when/consequence fields all
  in code.
- docs/FRONTEND_BACKEND_MIGRATION.md — localStorage → Supabase guide
  that no longer reflects reality (tool-till-tees API is the data
  layer now; only ephemeral local caches remain).

Deleted (git log preserves their history). README doc index and TODO
Two-browser-testing pointer rewritten to not depend on the deleted
migration doc. CLAUDE.md Architecture tree adds the still-relevant
SPEC_tool_till_tees_additions.md and the Backend line now reflects
the actual architecture (Supabase auth+realtime + tool-till-tees
REST API) rather than pointing at the soon-to-be-removed supabase/
directory.

SESSION_NOTES.md fully rewritten to cover this branch: auth bypass
shim, CLAUDE.md fleet alignment, Z_INDEX_SCALE adoption, EVENT_BUS
N/A, APP_ICONS hardening, and the doc cleanup itself.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, doc-cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
